allow: Bash(python3 -c "from app.main import app; print\(f'app OK — {len\(app.routes\)} total routes'\)")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT c.id, c.title, length\(c.draft_markdown\), c.actual_word_count, c.status FROM chapters c WHERE c.id IN \(1,2,3,4,5,6,31,32,33,34,35\);")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT c.id, c.status, c.actual_word_count, c.updated_at FROM chapters c WHERE c.id IN \(1,2,3,4,5,6,31,32,33,34,35\) ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT c.id, c.title, c.status, c.actual_word_count, length\(c.draft_markdown\) FROM chapters c JOIN book_parts p ON c.part_id = p.id WHERE p.book_id = 2 ORDER BY c.number; SELECT '=== JOBS ==='; SELECT id, status, substr\(started_at,1,16\), substr\(finished_at,1,16\), error_message FROM ai_jobs WHERE book_id=2 ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT last_audit_json FROM chapters WHERE id=1;")

Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "INSERT INTO ai_jobs \(book_id, chapter_id, kind, status, requested_by_user_id, input_json, created_at\) VALUES \(2, 1, 'audit', 'queued', 4, '{\\"chapter_id\\": 1}', datetime\('now'\)\); SELECT last_insert_rowid\(\);")

Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT id, title, status, actual_word_count, last_audit_verdict, json_extract\(last_audit_json,'$.total'\), json_extract\(last_audit_json,'$.quality_gate'\) FROM chapters WHERE id=33;")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT id, book_id, chapter_id, kind, status, substr\(created_at,1,16\), substr\(started_at,1,16\), substr\(finished_at,1,16\) FROM ai_jobs ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as running FROM ai_jobs WHERE status='running';")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT id, status, substr\(started_at,1,16\) FROM ai_jobs WHERE status='running' ORDER BY id;")

Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "UPDATE ai_jobs SET status='queued', started_at=NULL WHERE status='running' AND id IN \(23,24,25,26,27,28,29\); SELECT id, status FROM ai_jobs WHERE id IN \(23,24,25,26,27,28,29\);")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT id, status, substr\(started_at,1,16\) FROM ai_jobs WHERE id IN \(23,24,25,26,27,28,29\) ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT id, status, substr\(started_at,1,16\) FROM ai_jobs WHERE status IN \('running','queued'\) ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as running FROM ai_jobs WHERE status='running'; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as queued FROM ai_jobs WHERE status='queued';")
Bash(sqlite3 aibookly.db "SELECT id, kind, status, error_message FROM ai_jobs WHERE id=28;")

hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
